episodes.title: Was This Possible Epstein Co-Conspirator ACTUALLY His Victim??
episodes.description:
Sarah Kellen, a former assistant to Jeffrey Epstein for over a decade, has officially gone on the record claiming that she was not an aide to his crimes, but rather another victim of them. This comes despite opposing statements from other survivors, such as Teresa Helm, who said that Kellen "groomed her for abuse" and that she's unconvinced that she didn't know what she was doing.

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire Media is reporting on this developing story. Kellen, who agreed to an exclusive interview with MS Now, reveled that Epstein supposedly included her as a "co-conspirator" in court filings in 2007, something she never agreed to or was consulted on. She also says that she wants to help women who are currently trapped in similar situations by sharing her story. She will also be sharing this story with Congress as part of the overall investigation into Epstein being executed by the House. 

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

episodes.title: Trump DOESN'T Want You To Know What Was Said In THIS Epstein Hearing...
episodes.description:
The transcript of Howard Lutnick’s closed-door Oversight Committee testimony about his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein was just released, coming after the Epstein files directly contradicted Lutnick’s earlier claims that he completely cut ties with Epstein in 2005.

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire news dives into the details of the hearing. Lawmakers questioned Lutnick for multiple hours about why he visited Epstein’s private island in 2012, exchanged emails with him in 2018 and maintained any level of contact after Epstein’s 2008 conviction. Lutnick of course maintains all interactions were "meaningless", but that's not what the files demonstrate. Why is Lutnick continuing to be so evasive? What, or who, is he trying to hide? Follow COURIER's ongoing coverage of the Epstein investigation to find out.

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#Epstein #EpsteinFiles #JeffreyEpstein #HowardLutnick

episodes.title: THE TRUTH: Trump Ally Howard Lutnick UNRAVELS, Lies About Epstein Ties EXPOSED
episodes.description:
Howard Lutnick spent years publicly insisting he cut ties with Jeffrey Epstein after 2005 and would “never be in the room” with him again. But now, under oath behind closed doors before Congress, that entire timeline is starting to unravel.

Kat Tenbarge of @SpitfireNews is breaking down the explosive House Oversight testimony where Trump Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick reportedly admitted he continued interacting with Epstein for years after Epstein pleaded guilty to soliciting a minor. Lawmakers say Lutnick acknowledged visiting Epstein’s private island in 2012, meeting with him multiple times between 2005 and 2019 and even living next door to him for years — all while publicly telling a very different story. According to members of Congress in the room, Lutnick struggled to explain why he continued maintaining contact with Epstein long after the financier became one of the most infamous sex offenders in the country.

Democrats walked out of the deposition furious. Congressman Ro Khanna said Lutnick’s answers were so bad that if Trump personally watched the testimony, “he would’ve fired him.” Other lawmakers accused Lutnick of twisting the meaning of his own past statements to avoid admitting he lied about his Epstein relationship for years. Some Democrats are now questioning whether Trump administration officials coached Lutnick before the testimony because his story has shifted so dramatically from what he previously said publicly — including backing away from earlier comments suggesting Epstein used blackmail and hidden recordings involving powerful people.

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more videos like this

episodes.title: MUST WATCH: Epstein Survivors Help Forward New Bills To Hold Accomplices Accountable
episodes.description:
For the first time ever, survivors connected to Jeffrey Epstein’s trafficking ring testified directly before lawmakers. What happened next could completely change how powerful abusers and their networks are held accountable…

That’s why Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News is breaking down the emotional testimony from four Epstein survivors at the New York State Capitol and the major legislation lawmakers advanced right after. Survivors described years of trauma, intimidation and silence, with some speaking publicly for the very first time. One survivor accused the federal government, DOJ and FBI of refusing to truly help victims and hold powerful people accountable despite years of allegations surrounding Epstein and the people connected to him.

After hearing that testimony, New York lawmakers advanced multiple bills targeting trafficking networks, survivor protections and Epstein’s estate itself. The centerpiece is the Trafficking Survivor Recovery and Accountability Act, which would allow survivors to seek punitive damages from the estates of deceased abusers like Epstein and go after people who knowingly profited from trafficking operations. Another bill would make it easier for survivors to testify remotely instead of being forced to face their alleged abuser in court, while additional legislation creates tougher penalties for trafficking vulnerable people.

And this matters because under current New York law, victims can’t seek punitive damages from a dead person’s estate. That loophole has helped shield Epstein’s $120M estate from certain financial consequences even after years of lawsuits and accusations. The legislation would also create a new “lookback window” allowing survivors to file claims even if the statute of limitations expired, similar to New York’s Adult Survivors Act that led to thousands of abuse lawsuits against powerful figures across politics, entertainment and business.

Survivors aren’t just demanding accountability for Jeffery Epstein himself. They’re demanding accountability for the systems, institutions and powerful networks that protected him, enabled him and benefited while victims were ignored for decades.

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more videos like this

episodes.title: Is Epstein Why Peter Theil & Palantir Are CONTROLLING Our Politics??
episodes.description:
What if Epstein wasn’t just exploiting and abusing people, he was also controlling who ends up in power? 

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News is breaking down new reporting that shows Jeffery Epstein didn’t just have a relationship with Peter Thiel, he actively encouraged him to pursue politics. Hundreds of emails show Epstein pushing Thiel to get closer to Trump’s world during his 2016 campaign, connecting him with political and intelligence figures and even urging him to expand his influence when Thiel said he wanted to stay out of the spotlight. Epstein didn’t just turn Thiel into another donor, he made him a central force in the Republican party. 

But the relationship goes deeper than politics. The files also show a shared ideological world — one obsessed with genetics, artificial intelligence, transhumanism and reshaping humanity itself. Epstein was funding these ideas — from “designer baby” projects to research on AI and modifying the human brain. He even kept lists of powerful people he believed had "desirable" traits — like Peter Thiel. Epstein wasn’t just interested in collecting power, but in who he believed should shape the future of humanity. 

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more videos like this

episodes.title: MAGA IMPLODES, Lawmakers ATTACK Trump Over BUTCHERING Of Epstein Files
episodes.description:
Trump’s own MAGA base is turning on him over Epstein. 

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News is breaking down how GOP firebrands like Lauren Boebert, Nancy Mace and Anna Paulina Luna are now threatening to tank Trump’s legislative agenda after the Justice Department refused to release more Epstein records. They’re willing to blow up a massive package that includes renewing Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act powers, passing the Farm Bill and funding the Department of Homeland Security — all because of internal frustration over transparency and control.

And the stakes are huge. The Farm Bill alone shapes food programs and rural economies nationwide while the FISA renewal could let the government spy on Americans’ data. Now, with Republicans holding only a razor-thin majority, just a few defections could collapse the entire package, exposing how fragile Trump’s grip on his own party really is.

And the timing couldn’t be worse for Trump. His approval rating just hit a new second term low, with only about a third of Americans backing him as rising gas prices, the war with Iran and cost of living concerns hit voters hard. This Epstein fight is turning into something bigger than just documents. It’s a power struggle inside MAGA that could give Democrats the edge they need to take back Congress this midterms. 

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more videos like this

episodes.title: King Charles DECIMATES Trump In Speech But IGNORES Epstein & His Victims, Sparking Outcry
episodes.description:
King Charles III just stood in front of Congress and made the case for limits on power all because of Trump… 

That’s why Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News is going over the king’s historic address and how he pushed back on some of Trump’s biggest positions. From praising the Magna Carta as the foundation of checks on executive power to defending NATO and calling for continued support of Ukraine, Charles delivered a speech that left Democrats cheering while Republicans were slower to react…

However, one thing noticeably missing from his speech was any mention of Jeffery Epstein. Charles declined to meet with survivors of Jeffrey Epstein ahead of the visit and was expected to acknowledge them during his remarks, but ultimately didn’t. His brother, Prince Andrew, has long been linked to Epstein and faces allegations of sexual abuse and misconduct. While Charles has tried to distance the monarchy from the scandal by stripping Andrew of his royal duties and titles, avoiding the topic altogether during such a high-profile moment undermines the effort. 

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more videos like this

episodes.title: The Horrible Truth Behind The Builders Of Epstein's Zorro Ranch
episodes.description:
Why did a government contractor that works on top secret military facilities build Jeffery Epstein’s Zorro Ranch? Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News is breaking down new reporting that uncovers a surprising small detail buried deep in the Epstein files: the company behind Epstein’s massive New Mexico estate was Bradbury Stamm Construction — a firm known for building government, military and highly sensitive infrastructure. Not private homes. 

Using Epstein’s contact book and federal case records, reporting shows Bradbury Stamm Construction had a documented connection to Zorro Ranch. The same ranch that multiple victims of Epstein have said they were trafficked to as minors, drugged and abused as part of Epstein’s broader trafficking operation. Despite these reports, the ranch was never fully investigated for years. So Kat is looking into why this investigation was stalled by Donald Trump, what information is confirmed and what questions still remain unanswered about one of the most top secret properties in America.   

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more videos like this

episodes.title: Trump’s DOJ Said the Epstein Case was Over. This is What They’re Hiding.
episodes.description:
The Epstein files are raising new questions about Melania Trump and why she suddenly decided to publicly deny any close relationship with Jeffrey Epstein…

That’s why Tara McGowan sat down with investigative journalist Nina Burleigh, to unpack the hidden history connecting Donald Trump, Melania Trump, Jeffrey Epstein, Paolo Zampolli and the New York modeling world of the 1990s.

Nina has spent years reporting on Epstein, Trump and Melania’s past so she understands, better than anyone, why Melania’s recent White House press conference may have created more questions than answers. Nina digs into the gaps in Melania’s early biography, the modeling pipeline that brought young Eastern European women to New York and the powerful men who operated in that world.

Tara and Nina also break down the story of Amanda Ungaro, Paolo Zampolli’s former partner, who told Nina she knows more about Melania’s past and what the First Lady may be trying to keep hidden… 

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more videos like this
Follow Tara mcGowan on Instagram: @taramcgowanri
Check out Nina’s latest interview with Amanda Ungaro here: https://www.americanfreakshow.news/p/the-woman-who-knows-too-much-an-interview

episodes.title: NEW: Details Of Bill Gates and Epstein's SECRET Relationship To Be Revealed By Probe
episodes.description:
The Gates Foundation has now launched an external review into Bill Gates’ ties to Jeffrey Epstein, just weeks before he’s set to testify before Congress. This means that while Gates is already facing scrutiny from lawmakers, his own foundation is trying to assess how much damage Epstein may have done behind the scenes.

According to the foundation’s CEO, the review will look at the organization’s past engagement with Epstein and examine how it vets philanthropic partnerships. Gates is preparing to testify before the House Oversight Committee on June 10. His spokesperson says he insists he never witnessed or participated in Epstein’s crimes, but with each new document released, what used to just a few bad meetings about philanthropy now looks more like a years long personal and financial relationship. Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News dives into what we do and don't know about Epstein's connection to Gates, what Gates has admitted to vs. what the new probe intends to discover, and what we might expect to come from the House Oversight Committee this summer. 

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#Epstein #EpsteinFiles #BillGates #JeffreyEpstein

episodes.title: SHOCKING: Republicans Weigh PARDONING Ghislaine Maxwell In Epstein Investigation
episodes.description:
House Oversight members are now openly debating whether Trump should pardon Ghislaine Maxwell in exchange for her testimony on the Epstein case. Maxwell is currently the only person actually convicted in the entire Epstein network, and her legal team is saying she will only cooperate if she gets clemency. This comes as House Republicans are being accused of changing how the Oversight Committee operates to avoid advancing the Epstein investigation.

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News has all the details of the discussions coming from within the White House and beyond, including how even the Republican chair of the committee admitted that the move would look bad, referring to Maxwell as one of the worst people involved in Epstein's crime ring.
Democrats are of course saying this would be a massive coverup, and if Trump does grant clemency, Maxwell will have every incentive to say he wasn't involved — despite all evidence to the contrary.

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#Epstein #EpsteinFiles #GhislainMaxwell #JeffreyEpstein #DonaldTrump #Trump

episodes.title: BOMBSHELL REPORT: Witness Claims Melania Trump Had Direct Connection To Epstein
episodes.description:
A woman named Amanda Ungaro, who has known Donald and Melania Trump for decades, is now coming forward with new claims tied to the Jeffrey Epstein network. In a bombshell interview released by COURIER Newsroom correspondents Nina Burleigh and Katie Chenoweth this past Saturday, Ungaro revealed that she personally witnessed what she calls “highly compromising interactions” over a 20-year period.

Ungaro, a former model and ex of Paolo Zampolli, Trump's former business partner and “Special Envoy for Global Partnerships”, spent years within close proximity to both Trump and Melania. Supposedly Zampolli made a call this year that apparently resulted in Ungaro being deported by ICE, a move that looks much more calculated in light of her claims. This also comes right after Melania publicly denied any connection to Epstein, and threatened legal action against people spreading claims otherwise. That statement now looks a lot less random and more like a direct response to Ungaro’s allegations.

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News dives into this developing story, breaking down all of Ungaro's claims and the evidence available to back them up, how Zampolli has contributed to Trump & Melania's rise to power, and how the Epstein investigation could further expand if Ungaro testifies before the House.

This story is part of our project The Cover-Up: extended coverage designed to uncover the crimes within the Epstein files, and shed light on one of the biggest cover-ups by the federal government in history. To read the original interview from COURIER Newsroom, "The Woman Who Knew Too Much", click here: https://epsteincoverup.us/report/the-woman-who-knows-too-much-an-ungaro/

episodes.title: BREAKING: Epstein Cohorts Paid $1B To Hide Their Sex Trafficking Empire. We Dug It Back Up.
episodes.description:
A new report reveals that banks, powerful individuals, and global institutions connected to Jeffrey Epstein have collectively paid over $1 billion in settlements in order to avoid going to trial over their alleged roles in his sex trafficking operation. Examples include J.P. Morgan, Bank of America, Prince Andrew, Deutsche Bank, Leon Black, and more. At the same time, the Trump administration is continuing to claim there is not enough evidence to pursue broader criminal investigations into Epstein’s network. 

Despite all involved denying any wrongdoing, the money tells a different story about just how much they wanted to avoid scrutiny. This is over a billion dollars paid out to victims and almost every single one of these institutions and individuals settled right before trial, which is usually when evidence would become public. Mason of @onehandpolitics dives into which people, companies, and institutions are involved, how they've avoided larger investigations, and how Donald Trump and his DOJ have enabled their escape from larger consequences. 

This investigation was part of COURIER Newsroom's The Cover-Up, a project designed to bring all of the Epstein class to justice. Read the full article here: https://epsteincoverup.us/report/banks-epstein-cohorts-pay-1b-to-sweep-sex-trafficking-empire-under-the-rug/

episodes.description:

And instead of clearly supporting that, he brushed it off and said the women “refused to go under oath,” claiming that’s what he had heard and referred to the victims as “the victims or whatever”.

This moment also comes after Trump publicly praised Alan Dershowitz, calling him one of the greats
Alan was directly connected to Epstein, both as his attorney and someone in his social circle 
Trump’s casual attitude toward the biggest coverup in history feels even more stark when compared to how other nations are handling the Epstein fallout.

episodes.title: WHY Did These Longtime Epstein Associates Never Get Questioned?
episodes.description:
What if the biggest failure in the Epstein case wasn’t what happened… but what never got investigated? 

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News sits down with Camaron Stevenson to break down explosive new depositions from Jeffery Epstein’s inner circle — including his longtime lawyer and accountant. These are the first-ever testimonies from two of the men who managed Epstein’s money, his shell companies and his estate. And what they reveal is deeply unsettling… 

As these newly released Epstein files and congressional depositions surface, serious questions come up: Why were key financial operators never questioned before? Why weren’t Epstein’s business records fully examined despite all the damning evidence? This video dives into the failures of the FBI, the role of financial networks in Epstein’s trafficking operation and what these missed investigations could mean for accountability today. 

From potential perjury to questions about political accountability and government oversight, this Epstein saga is far from over…

episodes.title: Prosecutor Tied To Epstein Now Overseeing The Epstein Investigation (Yes, Really)
episodes.description:
In this video, Mason of @onehandpolitics is connecting Senator Ted Cruz’ viral “freudian slip” about how we should all “stop attacking pedophiles” to a much deeper issue: how the Trump administration is handling — or covering up — the Epstein case, starting with how a Trump-appointed prosecutor with financial ties to Jeffery Epstein is now overseeing key parts of the investigation, including document redactions. 

That prosecutor, Jay Clayton, has direct financial ties to major firms like Apollo Global Management, JPMorgan Chase, Citigroup and Bank of America — institutions tied to billions in suspicious transactions connected to Epstein’s network. Mason explains how this is a massive conflict of interest, creating an investigation that actually protects powerful elites instead of exposing the full truth. Foreign officials are even saying Trump’s administration is attempting to stage attacks similar to 9/11 to distract from his ties to Epstein. Watch this video to see just how deep the coverup goes. 

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more progressive political analysis, breaking news and deep dives into the biggest stories shaping US politics today.
